name: Fat-Free Pineapple Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9-inch round cake pan with cooking spray.
3. In the pan, stir together brown sugar, corn syrup, and lemon juice until combined.
4. Place the pan in the oven for 3 minutes.
5. Remove the pan from the oven and arrange the pineapple rings and cherries on top.
6. In a large bowl, combine flour, ARGO Corn Starch, baking powder, and salt.
7. In a medium bowl, stir together sugar and milk until well combined.
8. Add egg whites, corn syrup, and vanilla to the mixture; stir until blended.
9. Gradually stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until smooth.
10. Spoon the batter over the pineapple in the pan.
11. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Immediately loosen the cake from the pan and invert it onto a serving plate.
Makes 12 servings.
